name: Athens Country Club
description: Athens Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Athens, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights, trainers or lessons, restrooms, food, and water.

name: Cain Center YMCA
description: Cain Center YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Athens, TX. There are 7 wood and concrete courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, lights, water, locker rooms, wheelchair accessibility, food, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Non-members fee to play

name: Eight at Tool City Park
description: Eight at Tool City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tool, TX. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Gun Barrel City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Gun Barrel City Park in Gun Barrel City, TX! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Sunrise Point at Cedar Creek Lake
description: Sunrise Point at Cedar Creek Lake is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Malakoff, TX. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The court can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: The Eight at Tool Park
description: The Eight at Tool Park is a place to play pickleball in Tool, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
